inputs.label: Weight
inputs.businessContext: Body weight in kilograms (e.g., from scale measurement).

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight in kilograms (e.g., from scale measurement).

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age in years (for reference only; Navy formula does not use age).

businessContext_i18n.en: Age in years (for reference only; Navy formula does not use age).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş (sadece referans amaçlı; Navy formülü yaşı kullanmaz).

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: 0 for female, 1 for male (required for U.S. Navy body fat formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for female, 1 for male (required for U.S. Navy body fat formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 kadın, 1 erkek (ABD Navy vücut yağ formülü için gereklidir).

inputs.label: Waist Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Waist circumference measured at the navel level (required for Navy formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: Waist circumference measured at the navel level (required for Navy formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Göbek hizasında bel çevresi (Navy formülü için gereklidir).

inputs.label: Hip Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Hip circumference at the widest point (required for female Navy formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hip circumference at the widest point (required for female Navy formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: En geniş noktada kalça çevresi (kadın Navy formülü için gereklidir).

inputs.label: Neck Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Neck circumference measured just below the larynx (required for Navy formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: Neck circumference measured just below the larynx (required for Navy formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gırtlağın hemen altında boyun çevresi (Navy formülü için gereklidir).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
